forecast.name: Overnight
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly cloudy, with a low around 51. Southwest wind around 7 mph.

forecast.name: Friday
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly sunny. High near 64, with temperatures falling to around 62 in the afternoon. Southwest wind 5 to 14 mph, with gusts as high as 18 mph.

weather_report:
In the early morning hours, a gentle blanket of clouds lingers, hinting at lingering chilliness with lows around 51. As dawn breaks, a muted clarity begins to seep through, softening the outlines of the iconic spires and rolling hills, while the southwest wind stirs lazily, promising the stirrings of a pleasant day ahead. As Friday unfolds, the sun will emerge triumphantly, offering warmth with highs near 64, before settling back to a comfortable 62 in the afternoon. The wind picks up slightly, a companion to the sun’s ascent, with gusts reaching up to 18 mph, adding a playful edge to the atmosphere.

With the promise of sunshine and an invigorating breeze, one might choose to embrace the day with layers—a light sweater or cardigan to combat the morning chill while venturing out into the golden warmth of midday. The higher vistas are likely free of fog, allowing for a view unmarred by the marine layer that typically cloaks the Golden Gate. Consider a midday stroll along the Embarcadero or a leisurely visit to the many quaint cafés dotting the city. Perhaps take a moment to savor the lightness of this lovely day, a blend of sunshine and cool breezes, perfect for a thoughtful pause amidst the bustle of the city.
